roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 3D/CTS:2/SWAPD:11-30-17/X:DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE $260 CREDIT TOWARDS THE BASE FINE FOR THE ONE DAY OFCUSTODY SERVABLE BY SWAP/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $528 PLUS $454 IN  ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $982,/VF2:150/FOP1:3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP//X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & PROOF OF AA MEETINGS/X:THE DEFENSE DOES NOT HAVE ANY PROOF OF AA MEETINGS/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED ANDCONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 11-29-17/X: BAIL SET AT $5,000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAYED/DOPC/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/GTWM/987,2/ /DEF:TO DO 1 AA MEETING PER WEEK/CONTD:PRETRIAL/X:DAW IF PROOF SUBMITTED/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWSTAY:11-08-17/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL & PROOF OF AA/DAWT/X:PROOF OF AA PROVIDED,/CONT/DOPU:PROOFOF AA PROVIDED/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND PROOF OF A,A,/DAWT/X:PROOF OF A,A, IS CONFIRMED BY THE COURT,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND PROOF OF A,A,/DAWF/

/CAL:PRETRIAL & PROOF OF AA/DAWT/X:PROOF OF AA PROVIDED,/CONT/DOPU:PROOFOF AA/
